meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: Learn how Starion Digital protects your personal data on our augmented reality souvenir website.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.introduction: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.description: We may collect the following categories of data:
dataCollection.cookies: Cookies to save language and theme preferences.
dataCollection.usageData: Anonymous website usage data (e.g., pages visited).
dataCollection.contactData: Data you voluntarily provide when contacting us (name, email).

dataUsage.title: Data Usage
dataUsage.description: Data is used to operate the website, personalize, and improve service quality.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.description: We do not share your data with third parties, except as required by law.

dataStorage.title: Data Storage
dataStorage.description: Cookies are stored for 1 day to 12 months. Contact data is kept only for the duration of processing your request.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.description: You have the right to request a copy of your data, request corrections or deletion, and opt out of cookies.

changes.title: Changes
changes.description: We may update this policy. All changes will be posted here.

meta.title: Terms of Use
meta.description: Review the terms governing the use of Starion Digital’s augmented reality souvenir website.

Terms.title: Terms of Use
Terms.introduction: By using this website, you agree to the terms below.

useOfSite.title: Use of the Site
useOfSite.description: The site is provided 'as is.' Use it only for lawful purposes.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.description: All materials (logos, designs, texts, images, 3D models) belong to Starion Digital and are protected by copyright.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Actions
prohibited.illegal: using the site for illegal activities;
prohibited.spam: sending spam or attempting to hack;
prohibited.copy: copying or modifying site content without permission.

limitations.title: Limitation of Liability
limitations.description: We are not liable for damages caused by site use and do not guarantee uninterrupted operation.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.description: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Moldova / EU.

changes.title: Changes
changes.description: Terms may be updated. The new version will be posted on this page.

CookieBanner.message: We use cookies to enhance your experience. By continuing, you agree to our policy.

NotFound.title: Page Not Found
NotFound.description: Oops! The page you're looking for doesn't exist. Let's get you back to exploring our augmented reality souvenirs!

Orders.title: My Orders
Orders.empty: You don't have any orders yet.

Cart.realization_info: Consignment — you receive the goods without prepayment and pay for them as they sell. We'll contact you to agree on the terms.

Login.title: Partner Login
Login.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
Login.code_sent: Verification code sent to your email
Login.code_description: We sent a verification code to the email linked to your account. Enter it to complete sign-in.

ForgotPassword.title: Password recovery
ForgotPassword.identifier_description: Enter the login or email linked to your account. If the account exists, we'll send a verification code to the linked email.
ForgotPassword.code_sent: If the account exists, a code was sent to its email
ForgotPassword.code_description: Enter the code sent to the email linked to your account.
ForgotPassword.password_description: Choose a new password for your account.
ForgotPassword.done_description: You can now sign in with your new password. All previous sessions have been signed out.
ForgotPassword.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters

AccountSettings.title: My Account
AccountSettings.unauthorized: Sign in to view your account settings.
AccountSettings.enter_new_login_or_password: Enter a new login or new password
AccountSettings.need_email_for_credentials: Add and save an email in contact details to change your login or password
AccountSettings.unsaved_email_changes: You have unsaved email changes — save contact details first
AccountSettings.new_email_code_sent: Code sent to the new email
AccountSettings.dialog_description_step1: Step 1 of 2. We sent a code to your current email ({email}) — confirm it's really you requesting the email change.
AccountSettings.dialog_description_step2: Step 2 of 2. We sent a code to the new email ({email}).
AccountSettings.dialog_description_remove: We sent a code to your current email ({email}) to confirm removal.
AccountSettings.dialog_description_default: We sent a verification code to {email}
AccountSettings.email_hint: We strongly recommend linking an email — without it you can't change your login or password
AccountSettings.new_data_heading: New Details (fill in what you need)
AccountSettings.optional_placeholder: Leave empty if you don't want to change it
AccountSettings.need_email_hint: Add and save an email in contact details to be able to change your login and password
AccountSettings.unsaved_email_hint: Save the changed email in contact details first

Partnership.title: Partnership Application
Partnership.description: Fill out the form and we will contact you to discuss cooperation terms
Partnership.password_hint: We will create an account for you with these credentials
Partnership.message_placeholder: Tell us about your company, planned order volumes, etc.
Partnership.success_message: Your application has been successfully submitted. We will review it soon and contact you.
Partnership.error_network: Error sending. Please try again later.
Partnership.email_not_verified: Please verify your email with the code
Partnership.code_sent: Verification code sent to your email
Partnership.code_description: We sent a verification code to {email}. Enter it to submit your application.
